title: ISRO Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: ISRO Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
ISRO Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ISRO Advisory Limited:
ISRO Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ISRO Advisory Limited!
